files.patch:
@@ -98,0 +98,8 @@
+# Test and fix riscv64.
+if [ "x$OUT" = x ]; then
+  if [ `uname -s` = Linux ]; then
+    if [ `uname -m` = riscv64 ]; then
+      OUT=riscv64-unknown-linux-gnu
+    fi
+  fi
+fi

@@ -4413,1 +4413,1 @@
-DATE_WHEN_GENERATED=1767977874
+DATE_WHEN_GENERATED=1779849897
@@ -13909,0 +13909,6 @@
+    riscv64)
+      VAR_CPU=riscv64
+      VAR_CPU_ARCH=riscv
+      VAR_CPU_BITS=64
+      VAR_CPU_ENDIAN=little
+      ;;
@@ -14053,0 +14059,6 @@
+    riscv64)
+      VAR_CPU=riscv64
+      VAR_CPU_ARCH=riscv
+      VAR_CPU_BITS=64
+      VAR_CPU_ENDIAN=little
+      ;;

@@ -1962,0 +1962,3 @@
+  #ifndef EM_RISCV
+  #define EM_RISCV      243               /* RISC-V */
+  #endif
@@ -1986,0 +1989,1 @@
+    {EM_RISCV,       EM_RISCV,   ELFCLASS64, ELFDATA2LSB, (char*)"RISC-V"},
@@ -2020,0 +2024,2 @@
+  #elif  (defined RISCV)
+    static  Elf32_Half running_arch_code=EM_RISCV;
@@ -2022,1 +2028,1 @@
-         IA32, AMD64, IA64, __sparc, __powerpc__, ARM, S390, ALPHA, MIPS, MIPSEL, PARISC, M68K, AARCH64, LOONGARCH64
+         IA32, AMD64, IA64, __sparc, __powerpc__, ARM, S390, ALPHA, MIPS, MIPSEL, PARISC, M68K, AARCH64, LOONGARCH64, RISCV
